title: Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) (Remote)
description: Role : Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) (Remote) Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type : Full-Time Payout : $230K - $280K/yr Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) - US to work on a full-time basis. The role involves building and maintaining scalable web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks and backend services. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions. Key Responsibilities: • Develop and optimize full-stack applications using React.js for frontend and Node.js for backend services. • Design and implement RESTful APIs and database schemas to support application functionality. • Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code while adhering to best practices and coding standards. • Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues across the stack to ensure system reliability. • Participate in code reviews, architectural discussions, and sprint planning to drive continuous improvement. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in React.js and Node.js with a strong understanding of their ecosystems. • Experience with frontend technologies such as HTML5, CSS3, and modern JavaScript (ES6+). • Familiarity with backend frameworks like Express.js and database systems such as PostgreSQL or MongoDB. • Knowledge of version control systems, particularly Git, and CI/CD pipelines. • Experience with testing frameworks (Jest, Mocha) and debugging tools. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of mission-critical applications. The position provides exposure to cutting-edge technologies and collaborative problem-solving in a distributed team environment. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Senior React Native Developer (Crypto-wallet)
description: This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Senior React Native Developer (Crypto-wallet) based in Turkey. This role sits at the intersection of mobile engineering, fintech innovation, and blockchain technology, focused on building and evolving a high-performance non-custodial crypto wallet. You will take ownership of core user-facing features such as sending and receiving assets, transaction history, swaps, bridges, and on-ramp flows. The role also extends into advanced financial capabilities, including crypto cards, IBAN-based payments, subscriptions, and multi-provider integrations across different geographies. You will work in a fast-moving, product-driven environment where engineering decisions directly impact real user funds and global financial interactions. Ownership is end-to-end, covering architecture, development, testing, production monitoring, and continuous improvement based on real user feedback. You will collaborate closely with Product, Design, Backend, and QA teams in a highly autonomous, international setting. This is a high-impact role for engineers who thrive in complex systems and want to shape the future of decentralized finance. Accountabilities Own and evolve core features of a non-custodial crypto wallet, including transactions, balances, swaps, bridges, onboarding flows, and transaction history. Lead the development of advanced financial products such as crypto cards, IBAN payments, subscriptions, and integrations with global card providers. Drive end-to-end feature delivery from architecture and implementation to testing, production monitoring, and iterative improvements based on user feedback. Collaborate with Product and Design teams to define user experience, clarify requirements, and co-create impactful fintech solutions. Work closely with Backend and QA engineers to ensure high-quality releases, robust testing coverage, and well-documented systems. Participate in on-call rotation to support production systems and ensure reliability of financial operations. Produce clear technical documentation, internal guides, and occasional product demonstrations for cross-functional teams. Contribute to architectural decisions and continuously improve system performance, scalability, and maintainability. Requirements 5+ years of frontend development experience, including at least 3+ years building React Native applications in production environments. Proven experience working on high-load fintech or crypto applications, ideally non-custodial wallets handling real user transactions. Strong expertise in React, React Native, and TypeScript, with solid testing practices using Jest and Detox. Experience with modern mobile ecosystems including Expo modules and React Native tooling. Familiarity with blockchain ecosystems, including EVM-compatible chains, Bitcoin-family networks, Tron, Solana, or TON. Strong understanding of secure software development, especially in environments involving financial transactions. Experience with Git workflows, CI/CD pipelines, and GitHub Actions for production deployments. Ability to evaluate technical trade-offs and make data-driven architectural decisions. Strong collaboration and communication skills in cross-functional, product-driven teams. Comfortable working in an autonomous environment with end-to-end ownership. Nice to have: experience with WalletConnect, Reanimated, Skia, Sentry, Firebase, or similar tooling. Strong interest in AI-assisted development and automation to improve engineering productivity. Upper-intermediate English proficiency (Russian fluency is a plus). Benefits Fully remote work in an international, agile team shaping the future of decentralized finance Competitive salary based on experience and performance High ownership and autonomy over technical and product decisions Strong engineering culture focused on modern tools and continuous innovation Career growth opportunities in a fast-scaling fintech environment Transparent feedback culture with clear impact visibility Opportunity to work on cutting-edge blockchain and crypto wallet technologies Collaborative environment with product influence at the engineering level How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: PHP/Laravel Yazılım Uzmanı & Mobil APP
description: Oyuncu ve model ajansı olarak faaliyet gösteren yapımız bünyesinde; ajans yönetim panelleri, oyuncu–model başvuru sistemleri, kullanıcı ve içerik yönetimi altyapıları ile web ve mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerini birlikte yürütecek deneyimli bir Yazılım Uzmanı ile freelance ve proje bazlı iş birliği hedeflenmektedir. Bu pozisyon tam zamanlı bir işe alım değildir. Belirli projelerde, uzun vadeli ve sürdürülebilir bir iş birliği anlayışıyla çalışılması amaçlanmaktadır. Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde aktif olarak geliştirilmekte ve güncellenmektedir. Ayrıca; oyuncu ve model ajansı dışında, reklam ve dijital projeler üreten ayrı bir yapımız bulunmaktadır. Dileyen adaylarla bu yapı altında da ek freelance yazılım projeleri gerçekleştirilebilecektir. Görev ve Sorumluluklar Mevcut web tabanlı yönetim panellerinin geliştirilmesi ve yeniden yapılandırılması AngularJS tabanlı admin panel altyapılarının bakımı, geliştirilmesi ve modern backend mimarileri ile entegrasyonu Mevcut backend yapılarının Laravel framework’ü ile yeniden kurgulanması ve iyileştirilmesi Oyuncu & model başvuru sistemleri, ajans içi yönetim panelleri ve özel modüllerin geliştirilmesi Web projelerle entegre çalışan mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak Mobil uygulamalar için gerekli backend servislerinin ve RESTful API’lerin geliştirilmesi AWS veya benzeri cloud sunucu altyapılarında kurulum, taşıma, yönetim ve performans optimizasyonu Üçüncü parti servisler, ödeme sistemleri ve harici API entegrasyonlarının yürütülmesi WordPress tabanlı kullanıcı arayüzleri ile özel yazılım sistemleri arasında entegrasyon sağlanması Aranan Nitelikler PHP & MySQL konusunda ileri seviye bilgi sahibi Laravel framework’ü ile aktif ve profesyonel proje tecrübesi olan AngularJS veya benzeri JavaScript tabanlı admin panel yapılarıyla çalışma deneyimi Legacy sistemlerin modern framework’lere (özellikle Laravel) taşınması konusunda tecrübeli Mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde deneyimli (Flutter, React Native veya benzeri teknolojilerle geliştirme yapmış ya da bu süreçleri backend tarafında uçtan uca yönetmiş) Mobil uygulamalarla entegre çalışan backend servisleri ve API’ler geliştirmiş AWS veya benzeri sunucu sistemlerinde (EC2, S3, RDS vb.) deneyimli HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap teknolojilerine hâkim API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerinde tecrübeli Minimum 5 yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme tecrübesi Freelance ve proje bazlı çalışma disiplinine uygun Sorumluluk sahibi, güvenilir ve çözüm odaklı Teknik dokümanları okuyabilecek düzeyde İngilizce bilgisi İş Birliği ve Ödeme Modeli Çalışma modeli freelance ve proje bazlıdır İş başlangıcında karşılıklı sözleşme yapılır Ödemeler, proje teslimi ve test süreçlerinin onaylanmasının ardından gerçekleştirilir Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde düzenli olarak geliştirilmektedir Uzun vadeli, karşılıklı güvene dayalı iş birlikleri önceliklidir

title: Full Stack Developer (Backend Focus)
description: MedyaPlus olarak geliştirmekte olduğumuz SaaS tabanlı yazılımda görev alacak, teknik geliştirme süreçlerini yönetebilecek deneyimli bir Full Stack Developer arıyoruz. Nitelikler Yazılım geliştirme alanında minimum 3 yıl profesyonel deneyim Node.js ile backend geliştirme konusunda ileri seviye bilgi Next.js, React ve TypeScript ile canlı projelerde çalışma deneyimi Bulut altyapı, deployment ve ölçeklenebilir sistem mantığını bilen Veritabanı modelleme, sorgu optimizasyonu ve veri güvenliği bilgisi Cache yapıları, performans optimizasyonu ve yüksek trafik yönetimi deneyimi SaaS ve multi-tenant sistem mimarilerine hâkimiyet Teknik dokümanları okuyup uygulayabilecek seviyede İngilizce Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya dengi 4 yıllık bölümlerinden mezun Sorumluluklar SaaS ve özel yazılım projelerinde aktif geliştirme yapmak Backend servisleri ve API süreçlerini geliştirmek Mevcut projelerde performans ve yapı iyileştirmeleri yapmak Gerektiğinde frontend tarafına destek vermek Tercih Sebepleri Sistem mimarisi oluşturma ve teknik karar alma deneyimi Uygulama güvenliği ve DevOps süreçleri hakkında bilgi Yüksek trafikli web projelerinde çalışmış olmak E-ticaret, kurumsal yazılım veya içerik tabanlı projelerde görev almış olmak **Bu pozisyon junior, yeni mezun veya deneyimsiz adaylar için uygun değildir . Uzaktan çalışma seçeneği yoktur. Sadece ofisten tam zamanlı çalışma için uygundur.
